login.title: Kirish
login.demo_hint: Quyida ikki rol uchun demo kirishlar bor yoki mock ma'lumotlar bilan qo'lda kirishingiz mumkin.
login.demo_credentials: Student demo: student@ieltsmock.dev / demo1234. Teacher demo: teacher@ieltsmock.dev / demo1234.

register.title: akkaunt yaratish
register.terms: Ro'yxatdan o'tish orqali Terms of Service va Privacy Policy ga rozilik bildirasiz.
register.success_check_email: Tasdiqlash havolasi emailga yuborildi. Akkauntni faollashtirish uchun havolani oching, so'ng kiring.

confirm.title: Akkauntni tasdiqlash
confirm.expired: Havola muddati tugagan yoki allaqachon ishlatilgan.
confirm.generic_error: Akkauntni tasdiqlab bo'lmadi. Keyinroq urinib ko'ring.

validation.password_min: Parol kamida {{count}} ta belgidan iborat bo'lishi kerak

ielts.headline: Band 9.0
ielts.subtitle: Reading, Writing va Listening amaliyoti analytics va review bilan.

dashboard.subtitle: Qaytganingiz yaxshi, {{name}}. Hozirgi taxminiy overall band: {{band}}.
dashboard.speaking_coming_soon: Speaking mahsulotda ko'rinadi, lekin to'liq testing flow hozircha yoqilmagan.
dashboard.plan_unavailable: Joriy plan ma'lumotlari hozircha API'da yo'q.
dashboard.plan_cta: To'lov va renewal backend tayyor bo'lgach ulanadi.

reading.title: Reading
reading.description: IELTS formatidagi matnlar va tushunish topshiriqlari.

writing.title: Writing
writing.description: Task 1 va Task 2 writing mashqlari mock rubric feedback bilan.

listening.title: Listening
listening.description: Note completion va exam-style savollar bilan audio amaliyoti.

speaking.title: Speaking
speaking.description: Examiner/candidate navbati va Part 1/2/3 o'tishlari bilan jonli speaking simulyatsiyasi.
speaking.integrity_warning: Bu sessiyada {{count}} ta integrity hodisasi qayd etilgan.
speaking.question: Savol
speaking.end_exam_confirm_body: Sessiya yakunlanadi va natija sahifasiga o'tadi.

overall.title: Overall imtihon
overall.description: Listening, Reading, Writing va Speaking birlashtirilgan IELTS oqimi, modullar orasida tanaffus bilan.
overall.resume_notice: Yakunlanmagan overall urinish topildi. Joriy bosqichdan davom eting.
overall.result_description: Bitta urinish ichida Listening, Reading, Writing va Speaking bo'yicha umumiy audit.
overall.break_description: Keyingi moduldan oldin qisqa dam oling.
overall.break_no_penalty: Tanaffus vaqtida sahifadan chiqib ketishingiz va keyin jarimasiz qaytib davom etishingiz mumkin.

my_tests.title: My tests
my_tests.description: Reading, Listening, Writing va Speaking urinishlari bitta sahifada.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Student profili, target band, streak va so'nggi performance.

teacher.dashboard_description: Qaytganingiz yaxshi, {{name}}. Bu yerda studentlar, risk signal va so'nggi urinishlar bor.
teacher.students_description: Student performance ni modul bo'yicha qidirish, filter qilish va ko'rish.
teacher.student_details_description: Urinishlar, writing submission va integrity history bilan batafsil analytics.
teacher.analytics_description: Zaif zonalar, savol turlari va completion sifati bo'yicha umumiy ko'rinish.
teacher.mentor_note_placeholder: Keyinroq bu blokka teacher note lar backend orqali ulanadi. Hozircha structured placeholder.
teacher.integrity_note: Bu urinishda integrity event bor. Keyingi homework berishdan oldin ko'rib chiqish kerak.

shared.tip_exam_1: Submit qilishdan oldin navigator orqali unanswered savollarni kuzating.
shared.tip_exam_2: Autosave faqat exam tab faol bo'lsa ishlaydi.
shared.tip_exam_3: Oxirgi daqiqalarni flagged item va vaqt nazorati uchun qoldiring.
shared.tip_speaking_1: Javobni tabiiy davom ettiring va fikrni aniq misol bilan mustahkamlang.
shared.tip_speaking_2: Agar fikr uzilib qolsa, savolga qayting va shu yo'nalishda davom eting.
shared.tip_speaking_3: Part 2 da long turnni tez tuzish uchun notes oynasidan foydalaning.
shared.tip_writing_1: Draft yozishdan oldin paragraph strukturani tez rejalang.
shared.tip_writing_2: Task 2 juda qisqa bo'lib qolmasin, aks holda overall band pasayadi.
shared.tip_writing_3: Final review ni grammar va takrorlanishlarni tuzatish uchun ishlating.
shared.integrity_terminated: Bu urinish faol session paytida exam tab yoki window tark etilgani uchun to'xtatildi.
shared.session_locked: Bu session endi faol emas. Review mavjud.
shared.answer_review_description: Saqlangan javoblarni to'g'ri javoblar bilan solishtirib, takroriy xatolarni toping.
shared.audio_progress: Transcript session vaqtida yashirin bo'ladi. Bu shell to'g'ri listening flow ni saqlaydi.
shared.listening_strict_audio_notice: IELTS Listening rejimi: audio uzluksiz ijro etiladi, pauza va o‘tkazib yuborish o‘chirilgan, faqat ovoz balandligi boshqariladi.
shared.listening_tap_to_start_audio: Brauzerda xavfsiz ijroni yoqish uchun bir marta bosing.
shared.exam_strict_mode_notice: Qattiq imtihon rejimi yoqilgan: tab/oynadan chiqish, route o‘zgartirish va copy/paste urinishni muddatidan oldin yakunlaydi.
shared.submit_confirm_description: {{count}} ta savol hali javobsiz. Hozir yuborishingiz yoki qaytib ko'rib chiqishingiz mumkin.
shared.leave_warning_description: Siz faol testdan chiqishga urindingiz. Testni davom ettirish uchun oynani yoping yoki urinishni user left sifatida yakunlash uchun hozir tugating.
shared.writing_submit_confirm: Submit dan keyin ikkala task ham qulflanadi. Faqat final draft tayyor bo'lsa davom eting.
shared.integrity_dialog_description: Exam tab dan chiqish strict integrity rule ni ishga tushirdi. Davom ettirib bo'lmaydi.
shared.resume_available: Bu test uchun tugallanmagan urinish topildi. Shu joydan davom ettirishingiz mumkin.
shared.time_is_up_notice: Vaqt tugadi. Final submit dan keyin backend bu urinishni time is up deb belgilaydi.
shared.submit_requires_choice_answers: {{count}} ta savol javobsiz qolgan. Hozir submit qilsangiz, ular noto'g'ri deb hisoblanadi.
shared.submit_requires_writing_answers: {{count}} ta writing task bo'sh qolgan. Hozir submit qilsangiz, ular noto'g'ri deb hisoblanadi.
shared.result_unavailable_description: Bu brauzer ushbu urinish uchun saqlangan submit javobini topmadi, shu sabab review ni hozir ochib bo'lmaydi.
shared.result_summary_only: Ushbu urinish uchun savolma-savol batafsil review mavjud emas.
shared.no_passage: Bu bo'lim uchun passage mavjud emas.
shared.evaluation_pending: AI evaluation hali jarayonda. Batafsil review backend qayta ishlagandan keyin ko'rinadi.
shared.ai_summary_subtitle: Ushbu urinish uchun avtomatik AI tahlili
shared.ai_summary_empty: Bu urinish uchun AI summary hali tayyor emas.
shared.ai_summary_processing: AI coach ushbu urinish uchun feedback tayyorlamoqda.
shared.ai_summary_failed: Bu urinish uchun AI summary yaratib bo'lmadi.
shared.ai_summary_left_unavailable: Bu urinish user left sifatida tugatilgani uchun AI summary mavjud emas.

validation.non_negative: Enter zero or a positive number.

dashboard.title: Admin dashboard
dashboard.description: A snapshot of the current content library and recent exam activity.
dashboard.snapshot_note: This dashboard is built from the existing admin list endpoints, so the metrics reflect the currently loaded snapshot rather than global totals.

reading.title: Reading builder
reading.description: Create and maintain reading tests, passages, blocks, questions, options and answers.
reading.empty_description: No reading tests have been created yet.
reading.invalid_test: The requested reading test could not be found.
reading.detail_description: Manage the reading test structure and every nested item from one place.
reading.manual_answers_description: Use this section to update or delete answers when the backend response does not expose answer identifiers.
reading.answer_contract_note: The read API does not expose answer identifiers, so updating or deleting answers requires the answer id manually.
reading.empty_passages: This test does not have any passages yet.
reading.empty_blocks: This passage does not have any blocks yet.
reading.empty_questions: This block does not have any questions yet.

delete_help.test: This removes the reading test and every nested passage, block and question.
delete_help.passage: This removes the passage and every nested block and question.
delete_help.block: This removes the block and every nested question.
delete_help.question: This removes the question, options and answers.

dialogs.delete_description: This permanently removes the reading test.

listening.title: Listening builder
listening.description: Create and maintain listening tests, parts, blocks, questions, options and answers.
listening.empty_description: No listening tests have been created yet.
listening.invalid_test: The requested listening test could not be found.
listening.detail_description: Manage listening test settings, structure and question flow from one screen.
listening.manual_answers_description: Use this section to update or delete answers when you already know the answer id.
listening.answer_contract_note: The backend does not expose listening answer identifiers in the read response, so answer updates and deletes require the answer id manually.
listening.option_contract_note: The listening detail response does not expose option correctness, so the list view cannot confirm which option is correct after reading the test.
listening.empty_parts: This test does not have any parts yet.
listening.empty_blocks: This part does not have any blocks yet.
listening.empty_questions: This block does not have any questions yet.

delete_help.test: This removes the listening test and every nested part, block and question.
delete_help.part: This removes the listening part and every nested block and question.
delete_help.block: This removes the block and every nested question.
delete_help.question: This removes the question, options and answers.

dialogs.delete_description: This permanently removes the listening test.

writing.title: Writing builder
writing.description: Create and maintain writing tests and their task parts.
writing.empty_description: No writing tests have been created yet.
writing.invalid_test: The requested writing test could not be found.
writing.detail_description: Manage writing test settings and task parts from one screen.
writing.empty_parts: This test does not have any writing parts yet.

delete_help.test: This removes the writing test and all of its parts.

dialogs.delete_description: This permanently removes the writing test.

lessons.title: Lessons
lessons.description: Manage lesson categories and the lesson library used by the platform.
lessons.category_required_note: Create at least one category before adding lessons.
lessons.empty_categories: No lesson categories have been created yet.
lessons.empty_lessons: No lessons have been created yet.

dialogs.delete_category_description: This permanently removes the selected category.
dialogs.delete_lesson_description: This permanently removes the selected lesson.

exams.title: Exam reviews
exams.description: Inspect exam attempts by module and review writing submissions.
exams.empty_description: No exam attempts were found for this module.
exams.detail_description: The admin exam detail endpoint currently returns summary metadata for the selected exam.
exams.review_note: Writing review is manual because the admin exam endpoints do not expose writing exam part ids or full writing content in the detail response.
exams.review_description: Use the exam part id to mark a writing submission as checked and store corrections or a score.
